texto: Spiritualism exits only for individuals. Reason is born when two men interact
autor: addition of more and more members necessitates the spreading of the reason culminating as culture. Hence a culture is as dynamic as the reason. The nature of the reason is the nature of the spirit within for some and instinct for some others.
explicacao: Citação de addition of more and more members necessitates the spreading of the reason culminating as culture. Hence a culture is as dynamic as the reason. The nature of the reason is the nature of the spirit within for some and instinct for some others. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Spiritualism exits only for individuals.
